---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation | 问题/动机

A clear description of the problem or use case that motivates this feature request.

## Proposed Solution | 建议的解决方案

Describe the solution you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered | 考虑过的替代方案

Any alternative solutions or approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context | 补充信息

Any other context, mockups, or references related to this request.
